arabic_text:
فلک محیط
عمق اول
مزاج ممتزج
english_text:
Encompassing Sphere
First Depth
Mixed Temperament
Length
Width
Depth
alt_text: The same oval cosmological diagram as image 004 but with the central yellow sphere highlighted. Two red arrows point to it: one labeled 'عمق اول' (First Depth) and the other labeled 'مزاج ممتزج' (Mixed Temperament). The outer green oval is labeled 'فلک محیط' (Encompassing Sphere) on both sides.
notes: Zoom-in detail of image 004's central sphere — identifies it as the 'First Depth' which is the locus of the Mixed Temperament where the elements combine.
